content.text:
[cron:c9a6a5f6-ba9e-481f-a38d-4e70fd2cd39f lynch-pushup-reminder] 用 message 工具发送（channel=feishu, target=user:ou_b83724522290b2449d9ecb7166431801）提醒 Lynch 做俯卧撑。内容简短即可，比如'💪 俯卧撑时间到！3组做到力竭的70%'。
Current time: Tuesday, April 14th, 2026 — 20:00 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-04-14 12:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
I need to use the message tool to send a push-up reminder to Lynch. Looking at the parameters:

- channel: "feishu" 
- target: "user:ou_b83724522290b2449d9ecb7166431801"
- content: The reminder message should be short: '💪 俯卧撑时间到！3组做到力竭的70%'

The message tool has these required parameters:
- action: "send" (since we're sending a message)
- message: This might be the actual message content
But wait, let me check the message tool more carefully...

Looking at the message tool definition, it has:
- action (required): should be "send" 
- channel (required): "feishu"
- target (required): the user ID "user:ou_b83724522290b2449d9ecb7166431801"

But I also need to provide the actual message content. Let me look for the right parameter...

Looking at the message tool parameters, I see:
- message: The message content to send

So I need to call message with:
- action: "send"
- channel: "feishu" 
- target: "user:ou_b83724522290b2449d9ecb7166431801"
- message: "💪 俯卧撑时间到！3组做到力竭的70%"

content.text: I'll send the push-up reminder to Lynch using the message tool.

arguments.message: 💪 俯卧撑时间到！3组做到力竭的70%
